title: The Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital (Acquisition and Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1977
full_text: The Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital (Acquisition and Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1977 लेडी हार्डिंग आयुर्विज्ञान महाविद्यालय और अस्पताल (अर्जन) और प्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम,1977 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197734 Act Number: 34 Enactment Date: 1977-12-03 Act Year: 1977 Short Title: The Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital (Acquisition and Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1977 Hindi Title: लेडी हार्डिंग आयुर्विज्ञान महाविद्यालय और अस्पताल (अर्जन) और प्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम,1977 Long Title: An Act to provide for the acquisition of the Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital and for the management of the Kalavati Saran Hospital, with a view to ensuring better facilities for higher medical education for women and medical facilities for women and children in the Union territory of Delhi and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 01-02-1978 Notification: 1st February, 1978, vide notification No. S. O. 188(E), dated 12th January, 1978, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital (Acquisition and Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1977 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ACQUISITION OF LADY HARDINGE MEDICAL COLLEGE AND HOSPITAL CHAPTER III MANAGEMENT OF THE KALAVATI SARAN HOSPITAL CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital to vest in Central Government. Section 4. Payment of amount. Section 5. Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital to be administered as Government institution. Section 6. Applicability of Act 2 of 1882 to Board of Administration. Section 7. Amount to be held for purposes of Scheme. Section 8. Kalavati Saran Hospital to be managed as Government institution. Section 9. Act to override all other enactments. Section 10. Provisions relating to officers and other employees of Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital and Kalavati Saran Hospital. Section 11. Effect of contracts, etc. Section 12. Contracts, in bad faith or detrimental to the interests of Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital and Kalavati Saran Hospital to be cancelled or varied. Section 13. Duty to deliver possession of property, etc. Section 14. Penalty. Section 15. Offences by companies. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Cognizance of offences. Section 18. Indemnity. Section 19. Power to make rules.
